scripts.stills:studio: npm run stills:css && remotion studio remotion/index.ts
scripts.stills:all: npm run stills:css && npm run stills:sidebar && npm run stills:ask-ai && npm run stills:edge-trigger && npm run stills:panel-home && npm run stills:panel-chat && npm run stills:panel-plan && npm run stills:chat-input && npm run stills:text-selection

scripts.videos:banking: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts demo-banking public/marketing/BankingDemo-technical.mp4
scripts.videos:crm: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts demo-crm public/marketing/CRMDemo-technical.mp4
scripts.videos:analytics: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts demo-analytics public/marketing/AnalyticsDemo-technical.mp4

scripts.videos:hr: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts demo-hr public/marketing/HRDemo-technical.mp4

scripts.wireframes:crm: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts wireframe-crm public/marketing/CRMWireframe.mp4
scripts.wireframes:analytics: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts wireframe-analytics public/marketing/AnalyticsWireframe.mp4

scripts.wireframes:hr: npm run stills:css && remotion render remotion/index.ts wireframe-hr public/marketing/HRWireframe.mp4
